sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐγώ

- Transliteration: Ego

- Phonetic: eg-o'

- Definition:

1. I, me, my

- Origin: a primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic)

- TDNT entry: 07:43,2

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: A primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic): - I me. For the other cases and the plural see G1691 G1698 G1700 G2248 G2249 G2254 G2257 etc.
